ads.author: Jon Caloon
ads.title: Need for Speed 2 underground arcade game
ads.description: Need for Speed 2 underground arcade game $800 obo K H: 79′′, W: 34′′, D: 66′′ Weight: 700lb GLOBALVR’S NEED FOR SPEED UNDERGROUND FEATURES: – 3rd console-to-arcade conversion of the popular Need For Speed series – Cutting edge graphics for its time displayed on a 27′′ CRT – Race several licensed cars including the Toyota Celica, Nissan 350Z, Mitsubishi Eclipse & Nissan Skyline GTR – 3 race modes & 25 tracks – Build up style points as you race – Customize your vehicle’s appearance & performance with licensed aftermarket parts – Standard racing controls: force feedback steering wheel, gas/brake pedal; up/down manual shifter; NOS boost – Save your progress using the GlobalVR Card Reader; original units also shipped with a card dispenser – Standard model; also available in a Deluxe motion model

ads.title: Title Fight Arcade Cabinet (Project) - TRADES ACCEPTED
ads.description: Title Fight Arcade Cabinet Project Piece. Receives power and intermittent signal to monitors but game does not start and have too many other projects to work on to tackle this one. Has two 26" Mitsubishi Monitors, all of the wiring is in tact, handles need repair/replacement, missing start button toppers. Good for a project or to part out - I just don't have time for either of those at this point. Looking for cash or trade for working arcade cabinets (coin operated, no Arcade 1Ups). Pickup in Jacksonville Florida. Item is heavy (and top heavy), lift gate recommended or three person load.

ads.author: Robert Stotts
ads.title: Classic Shinobi Full Size Arcade Game
ads.description: This is a full size original Shinobi arcade game. Fully functional and working. It has the original PCB motherboard and I have installed an eprom conversion kit to prevent it from not playing anymore after a certain amount of plays, but I also still have the original EPROMs in case you want to convert it back. I also have the original PCB motherboards for Aliens and Robocop if you are interested. in that as well.

ads.author: Byron Gaddis
ads.title: California Speed Video Driving Arcade Game
ads.description: Up for your consideration is a California Speed Arcade driving game. It plays as is but would definitely benefit from a LCD monitor. I’ve had this machine for about 8 years and it has just started buzzing when you turn it on. I don’t know anything about these but I did talk to an arcade dealer and he said that it’s likely inference or the sound board. This machine does have the ability to be paired with another machine. Will consider trading up or down for a slot machine, pinball machine, vintage gas pump, man cave stuff.
